morning_brief.preview:
---
# EverPass Morning Brief — Friday, May 15, 2026

## Critical / Time-Sensitive

1. **SAMSUNG CTV** — T-5 DAYS TO LAUNCH (May 20) [UNSIGNED]
   Separate Agreement still not executed; Samsung Standard Terms revenue/ad share exemption contingent on signature. Chi Tung confirmed today (12:33) Samsung requires participation in subscription and ad economics — this is a blocking issue. Today is the last business day before the weekend; escalate to Annie O'Brien (a1.obrien@samsung.com) and Chi Tung immediately.
   **Deadline: May 20. 5 days remain. No signed agreement = no launch protection.**

2. **CHARTER** — F&B PRICING TIERS DUE TODAY EOD [OVERDUE EXHIBITS]
   Hospitality/F&B tiers (Chili's co-sell, FCO sub-350 thresholds) due today. Exhibit A overdue +30 days; Exhibit B overdue +14 days. Alyssa Wade's revised amendment (off 3/27 draft) requires review. Nick Clessuras's Joe Hand/Miller's Ale House pricing exposure flag must be resolved before delivery.
   **Deadline: TODAY EOD. Deliver F&B tiers. Review Wade amendment. Clear Clessuras flag.**

3. **CHARTER (LANGE TRIGGER)** — STATUS UNKNOWN [OVERDUE +3 DAYS]
   Lange trigger was flagged for execution May 12 — no confirmed outcome visible in deal tracker. Charter's deliverable deadline is today, making this doubly urgent.
   **Deadline: OVERDUE. Verify execution status first thing this morning — check cockpit.**

4. **NESN** — DEADLINE PASSED (May 13) [STATUS UNKNOWN]
   Clean term sheet v7 deadline (Bob Plaehn / Goldwyn Harper) passed 2 days ago. MG structure ($300K combined Yrs 1–2 / $350K/yr from Yr 3) and Gate 3 clearance remain unresolved. No confirmed response in deal tracker.
   **Deadline: PASSED +2 days. Contact Plaehn/Harper today. Check cockpit.**

5. **DIRECTV** — SYMPHONYAI AUDIT DEMAND LAPSED [OVERDUE +14 DAYS]
   May 1 SymphonyAI file access deadline passed with no confirmed DTV delivery. Net underpayment claim $2,634,239.50; $65M second payment outstanding; litigation complaint near-ready. Brianna Santolli (Kelley Drye) drafting follow-up demand letter.
   **Deadline: PASSED +14 days. Confirm Priesand return date with Santolli today. Align on demand letter send date.**

6. **CHSN** — SECTION 5(e) LAPSED (~MARCH 29, 2026) [TOP CONTRACT RISK]
   Economics extraction completed; however, Section 5(e) lapsed ~47 days ago with no confirmed cure or resolution in deal tracker. Status unknown — check cockpit.
   **Deadline: LAPSED. Determine cure options and escalate. Top contract risk.**

7. **DISH** — CALL NOTES NOT LOGGED (May 13)
   Call with Katherine Richter (Katherine.Richter@dish.com) occurred May 13. Day-1 Charter-parallel model discussion noted as receptive. Deal is NOT in deal tracker.
   **Action: Log call notes and open Dish deal record in cockpit today.**

8. **NBCU** — ENO WINDOW CLOSES JULY 15, 2026 [61 DAYS]
   Phase 2b status: NBA on Peacock not included in current grant. Exclusive Negotiating Obligation window closes July 15. No counter-response visible.
   **Deadline: Jul 15. 61 days remain. Confirm Phase 2b scope and ENO strategy before window narrows further.**

9. **COCKPIT / AUTH** — INFRASTRUCTURE DEGRADED
   Auto-pipeline: 9th consecutive overnight miss (intraday run 2026-05-14 10:41 UTC broke streak but not stable). GWS invalid_grant 21+ days. ZAPIER_MCP_BEARER not in cockpit server. Comcast amendment placeholders (5 blank, inert at 1.0x). Victory+ WNBA amendment drafted but unsigned.
   **Action: Resolve ZAPIER_MCP_BEARER blocker. Re-auth GWS. Do not rely on overnight auto-pipeline for deal state.**

critical.title: CHARTER
critical.body: — F&B PRICING TIERS DUE TODAY EOD [OVERDUE EXHIBITS]

deals.next_action: (Active, Distribution): Counter expected 5/6-5/9 (Holden 5/5 ETA). NBA scope reply drafted, awaiting Ryan's send. Amended agreement deadline 6/15/2026. Spectrum TV Control Pro delayed 7/13. Fire Stick joint sales alignment needed before 5/21 STVA launch.
(Exploratory): Catch up rescheduled 5/5 to 5/7 10:30 (Gardiner). CONFLICT with Mediacom Discussion same slot 5/7 10:30. Project Gladiator boxing/FIFA+ scoping. Pre-commercial.
(Live): Bi-weekly integration 5/6 11:00 AM (Hegeman + cross-team). F1 Miami GP delivered 5/3. Watch IMAX expansion risk to MLS Season Pass and MLB Friday Night Baseball.
(Active, FAST): McCormack offering Fri 5/8 9:00-10:30 PT or 12:30-1:30 PT. Reply today. Executable draft 11 days overdue. Two-track deal: Weather API + 24/7 FAST channel; targeting late-May launch.
(Active, RSN): Plaehn 2nd chase 5/5 17:08Z. Respond within today or tomorrow. Term sheet v7 in NESN court since 4/12.
(Near Close, RSN): DocuSign 4/29 (Bernheimer); 5/1 follow-up. Ryan owes signature. July 2026 launch.
(Closed): NWSL amendment fully executed 2026-05-02 via DocuSign. Monitoring only.
(Legal Route Only): Legal + PR posture only per 5/5 directive. No commercial response. Rack rates NOT to be quoted.
(Active, Content): Altman 5/5 outbound on schedule. McIntosh Track A/B direction still overdue. EVO pricing gap and DAI impression share blank still open.

(Active, Content): Upfront 5/11 streaming. NBA confirmed NOT in commercial grant per 5/5 verification. Side letter or amendment required for any NBA commercial offering. CRITICAL mortality risk; term expires 2027-07-31 (~15 mo).
(Near Close, CTV): CTV launch 5/20 (14 days). Separate Agreement drafted, NOT executed. Without signature Samsung standard terms apply. Legal close needed this week.
(Active, RSN): Feneque 4/29 inbound on Exhibit B device multiplier discussion (3 fix options). Catch up next week.

items.text: Fully Executed Commercial Premises License in Place — EverPass and Amazon Content Services LLC have a fully executed Commercial Premises License Agreement covering TNF on Prime Video (NFL), NBA games (60+ regular season plus postseason), NASCAR Cup Series rac…

EverPass Is Not Exclusive for Small Venues; Effective Exclusivity Exists at Scale — DIRECTV FOR BUSINESS simultaneously distributes Apple TV F1, MLS, and MLB Friday Night Baseball to 300,000+ commercial venues; however, DIRECTV streaming has a 20-TV cap, mean…

Per-Event Fee Is $1,800 Up to 1,500 Concurrent Endpoints; Annual Service Fee Is $30,000 — Fixed fees: one-time activation fee of $20,000; annual service fee of $30,000; variable fees: $1,800 per live event (up to 1,500 concurrent delivery endpoints per event)…

Day-1 Dish Partnership Exploration Held — Charter-Parallel Model Receptive — First substantive packaging conversation between EP and Dish Business. Attendees: Andy, Kate (Dish); Ryan Blood, Alex Kaplan (EP). Sling Orange commercialization path closed by Dish…

Rate card is flagged as still under review — Schedule 1 carries a note that per-subscriber fees are "subject to Schedule 1 Section under the term sheet [Rate Card Under Review/Parties to Discuss]" and final rates are to be confirmed at execution; the current…

No Deal in Place; FOX Is the Only Major Broadcast Sports Provider Without an EverPass Agreement — FOX verbally committed EverPass as preferred commercial launch partner for Fox One DTC in July 2025; discussions stalled in November 2025 with no formal response…

Economics Gap: Zero-Fee vs. Paid-Per-Sub — EverPass proposes zero license fee with ad pass-through as consideration; Scripps Term Sheet requires paid per-sub fees at a rate card not yet provided. Neither side has moved and no counterpart economic draft exists.

RSN Distribution Is the Strategic Prize; MLB RSNs Cover Local Market Sports Beyond Baseball — The MLB RSN package would cover regional sports networks on a service-by-service, zip-code-defined territory basis; EverPass must distribute all RSN services as part…

April 12, 2026 Clean Draft Circulated; Multimillion-Dollar MG Remains Unresolved — EverPass circulated a revised clean distribution agreement draft (EP 4.12.26) that retained EverPass's position of a lower MG level framed as a termination right rather than a…

Go/No-Go Decision Pending After April 10 Exec Meeting — EverPass CEO Alex Kaplan signed the execution copy; Marquee counter-signature is outstanding pending Ryan Blood's go/no-go communication to Lee Schlazer (Sinclair SVP Distribution) following the April 10…
